messages.content: Stay hydrated.  Please expand the wording in 12 words as grade 11 student

Don't Sleep on Ice. Please expand in 12 word as a grade 11 student
Avoid sleeping on ice as it poses health risks and discomfort overnight.
Exercise Strong
Engage in rigorous physical activities regularly to build and maintain strong muscles.
Don’t Exercise Strong. Please expand in 12 word as a grade 11 student

Dont's Exercise Outdoor.  Please expand in 12 words as grade 11 student.
